name: Nano Nuclear Energy Inc.
business: Nano Nuclear Energy Inc. develops advanced nuclear microreactors, including the KRONOS MMR, LOKI MMR, and ZEUS reactors, and is building vertically integrated businesses in nuclear fuel processing, fuel transportation, and nuclear consulting services. The company is currently pre-revenue and expects to commercially launch its KRONOS MMR reactor in the early 2030s, with fuel processing and consulting services targeted for 2026. It aims to serve a range of end markets including remote communities, industrial operations, data centers, military installations, and space applications.
sellsTo: Data centers and artificial intelligence centers
U.S. national laboratories and DOE programs
Small modular reactor and microreactor companies

exposures.sentence: We are a nuclear energy and technology company, developing smaller, simpler, and safer advanced clean energy solutions, utilizing proprietary reactor designs, intellectual property, and research methods, to contribute towards a sustainable future.

The KRONOS MMR reactor will also target larger population centers, larger industrial operations, industrial heat for larger industries, and data and artificial intelligence centers for the tech industry.

The KRONOS MMR reactor will also target larger population centers, larger industrial operations, industrial heat for larger industries, and data and artificial intelligence centers for the tech industry.

We are evaluating the most effective means of tailoring our technology to address specific key markets, particularly military and remote applications that require smaller power outputs, for which we believe the ZEUS reactor is suited to supply.

The portable LOKI MMR reactor will target multiple applications, including remote locations unsuitable for larger reactor systems, such as islands; remote industrial operations, such as mining and oil and gas projects; and extra-terrestrial applications that require consistent power.

The portable LOKI MMR reactor will target multiple applications, including remote locations unsuitable for larger reactor systems, such as islands; remote industrial operations, such as mining and oil and gas projects; and extra-terrestrial applications that require consistent power.

The portable LOKI MMR reactor will target multiple applications, including remote locations unsuitable for larger reactor systems, such as islands; remote industrial operations, such as mining and oil and gas projects; and extra-terrestrial applications that require consistent power.
The cost of electricity generated from nuclear sources may not be cost competitive with other electricity generation sources in some markets, which could materially and adversely affect our business.
The market for SMRs generating nuclear power is not yet established and may not achieve the growth potential we expect or may grow more slowly than expected.

catalysts.event: NRC approval of Fuel Qualification Methodology Topical Report (FQM TR) for KRONOS MMR fuel
catalysts.sentence: In late April 2025, the U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission (NRC) issued its final Safety Evaluation (SE) approving the Fuel Qualification Methodology Topical Report (FQM TR) for the advanced fuel design to be used in the KRONOS MMR Energy System.

catalysts.event: Completion of retrofit of Westchester demonstration facility and commencement of operations
catalysts.sentence: In May 2025, we announced the completion of our retrofit of our demonstration facility and the commencement of operations there.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Global First Power Ltd. (GFPL) and rebranding to True North Nuclear
catalysts.sentence: On September 2, 2025, the GFPL Purchase Agreement and the transactions contemplated thereby were approved by the Bankruptcy Court, and on October 16, 2025, such transaction was closed.

catalysts.event: Anticipated submission of construction permit application for KRONOS MMR at UIUC to NRC
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate submitting our construction permit application to the NRC in early 2026, and receiving the construction permit in 2027.

catalysts.event: Expected commercial launch of nuclear consultation services
catalysts.sentence: Our goal is to start providing nuclear service support and consultation services for the nuclear energy industry in 2026.

catalysts.event: Expected commercial launch of fuel processing business
catalysts.sentence: We expect to launch our fuel processing business in 2026.

catalysts.event: Expected commercial launch of ALIP technology
Expected commercial readiness of KRONOS MMR reactor
catalysts.sentence: We estimate the early 2030s for commercial readiness.

catalysts.sentence: Given that the Canadian Consents were not achieved on a timely basis, we intend to seek a return of the $250,000 escrow amount.
